target.profile_note: post-pass181 pinned fmd linalg profile ranked pinv256 as the top non-GEMM row after the recursive/communication-avoiding GEMM route was rejected by the current bit-exact Dot/DotGeneral contract

source.candidate_lever: private Jacobi SVD U-output layout selector so pinv_svd can receive U columns directly and skip the row-major-to-column-major transpose
source.source_restored_proof: git diff -- crates/fj-lax/src/linalg.rs is empty after manual apply_patch restoration

benchmarks.baseline_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-x6y94-baseline-current cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/pinv_256x128_f64 --quick --noplot
benchmarks.candidate_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-x6y94-candidate cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/pinv_256x128_f64 --quick --noplot

candidate_isomorphism: rotation formula and W/V update order unchanged
singular-value norm computation and total_cmp sorting unchanged
public SVD row-major layout unchanged in the tested candidate
pinv result loops l->i->j and floating-point recurrence unchanged

post_revert_tests.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=fmd RCH_WORKERS=fmd RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR RCH_DAEMON_WAIT_RESPONSE_TIMEOUT_SECS=240 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-x6y94-proof cargo test -p fj-lax --lib pinv -- --nocapture

decision.result: Reject. Candidate regressed the same-worker benchmark, so no source lever is kept.
decision.next_route: Do not repeat SVD U-transpose/materialization micro-levers. Reprofile restored source and attack a different structural BLAS/LAPACK primitive, such as blocked/communication-avoiding SVD or LU/QR panel work with a proven behavior contract.
